description:
This is the first in a series of videos speaking from my own experiences with meditation over the last 48 years. Beginning back in 1972 with a practice that now has the name Mindfulness, I came to know the method of what is now called Heartfulness, which I have found to be very effective. If you are interested in an evolutionary approach to your own growth I would recommend Heartfulness Meditation. It's also free to learn and practice. 
www.heartfulness.org  

My art site is www.brianjonesgallery.com
and personal site is www.joyinrealtime.com
